materials.material: Calculations do not include gil cost for the items to desynth for the crafted items' materials and assume all of one currency is used on materials that multiple can be used for along with no daily/weekly quests being done

currencies.name: No calculations are done to account for Crystal Sand as there are so many methods to acquire it that would result in the total Poetics or Company Seal count to be meaningless
